error_signature: None of your tools were used in this run
title: Google Sheets tool not utilized in AI responses
symptom: The AI agent ignores the Google Sheets tool and provides incorrect information, stating 'None of your tools were used in this run'.
applies_when: AI agent is expected to reference data from the sheet
not_this_if: Using OpenAI node instead of AI Agent
root_cause: The AI agent may not be properly configured to utilize the Google Sheets tool, leading to it not referencing the data as intended. This can occur if the prompt does not clearly instruct the AI to use the tool or if the AI agent lacks the capability to interact with it effectively.
fix_steps: Switch from using the AI Agent to the OpenAI node in your workflow.
Ensure that the prompt explicitly instructs the AI to use the Google Sheets tool.
agent_instruction: Change the node from AI Agent to OpenAI node and adjust the prompt accordingly.
